name: @ember/chat
description: Ember Chat - Voice & Text chat with AI assistants

scripts.postinstall: node -e "const p=require('path'),f=require('fs');let eb;try{eb=p.dirname(require.resolve('electron/package.json'))}catch(e){process.exit(0)};const d=p.join(eb,'dist','Ember Chat.app','Contents','Resources','app');try{f.unlinkSync(d)}catch{};try{f.symlinkSync(__dirname,d)}catch(e){};const x=require('child_process');try{x.execSync('defaults write \"'+p.join(eb,'dist','Ember Chat.app','Contents','Info.plist')+'\" CFBundleIdentifier -string com.ember.chat')}catch(e){}"

author: Akira
